name: Battle Mine Sweeper
short_description: The classic PC game "Minesweeper" is now available as a PvE battle type! You can also play the puzzle games "Nikakudori" and "10x10 Puzzle". Embark on an adventurous journey while strengthening the skills you will learn as you fight!
detailed_description:
You can enjoy the adventure mode of all 60 stages of the first part 30 and the second part 30.

You can compete with other players in the weekly score ranking for your trained skills.

The more you fight, the more skills you learn, and the higher your skill level, the more you will overwhelm the enemies you have been struggling with.

[Main skills]
Whole body blow
　Shoot a whole blow to the opponent
Counter attack
　Inflict damage to the other party
Item destruction
　Destroy the item possessed by the other party
Item robbery
　Steal the item that the other party has
Continuous action
　You can act continuously
Clairvoyance
　Attack items are prioritized in the search
Patience
　Endure leaving 1 instead of 0 HP
Berserker
　AP will increase dramatically when it becomes a disadvantageous situation

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Thai, Vietnamese, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America, French, German, Dutch, Polish, Russian, Portuguese - Brazil, Turkish
